statement: INSERT INTO dataset (user_id, name) VALUES (%(user_id)s, %(name)s) RETURNING dataset.id

INSERT INTO stored_prompt (user_id, system_msg, messages, prompt_kwargs, extra_fields, num_tokens, timestamp) VALUES (%(user_id)s, %(system_msg)s, %(messages)s, %(prompt_kwargs)s, %(extra_fields)s, %(num_tokens)s, %(timestamp)s) RETURNING stored_prompt.id
INSERT INTO dataset_prompt (dataset_id, datum_id) VALUES (%(dataset_id)s, %(datum_id)s) RETURNING dataset_prompt.id

INSERT INTO stored_prompt (user_id, system_msg, messages, prompt_kwargs, extra_fields, num_tokens, timestamp) VALUES (%(user_id)s, %(system_msg)s, %(messages)s, %(prompt_kwargs)s, %(extra_fields)s, %(num_tokens)s, %(timestamp)s) RETURNING stored_prompt.id

parameters.messages: [{"role": "user", "content": "What is the square root of 1009 to 1 decimal place"}]

statement: INSERT INTO dataset_prompt (dataset_id, datum_id) VALUES (%(dataset_id)s, %(datum_id)s) RETURNING dataset_prompt.id

INSERT INTO evaluator (user_id, name, judge_prompt, prompt_parser, response_parser, class_config, judge_models, client_side) VALUES (%(user_id)s, %(name)s, %(judge_prompt)s, %(prompt_parser)s, %(response_parser)s, %(class_config)s, %(judge_models)s, %(client_side)s) RETURNING evaluator.id
